title: About Micro Toolkit
summary: Micro Toolkit is a fast desktop companion for office and home use, built around a dynamic plugin engine, lazy loading, app-level services, multilingual UI support, workflow automation, and desktop-native integrations.

project.heading: Project
project.body: The app shell, plugin discovery, translations, workflows, elevated broker, hotkey helper, and runtime services are all part of the same underlying desktop codebase rather than stitched-on external layers.
